name: mnemex
description: Mnemex Context Graph — a self-pruning, human-memory-modeled knowledge context graph for AI agents. Captures domain knowledge and patterns from build sessions into a file-based graph with hot/warm/cold memory tiers, lazy exponential decay, and deterministic maintenance. Capture is cheap and local; promotion merges and consolidates deliberately. Skills: mnx-read, mnx-capture, mnx-promote, mnx-doctor, mnx-init, mnx-status, mnx-config (plus the internal mnx-consolidate).
